\tzpentry{ID11404}{Five-Force Portal Equilibrium Balance}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The droplet portal-equilibrium condition is the vanishing of the gravity, surface-tension, inertial, acoustic-pressure, and drag force sum.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
F_{g}+F_{s}+F_{i}+F_{a}+F_{r}=0
